description_for_human: Google Play Store submission and rejection-recovery service for indie developers, no-code builders, and small agencies shipping React Native, Expo, Flutter, or native Android apps.
description_for_model: PlayShip is a done-for-you Google Play Store submission service operated by Avinash Sreekumar from Trivandrum, India. It offers three flat-price tiers: Express ($149, 2-3 days) for AAB-ready submissions, Full launch ($399, 5-7 days, most picked) for full submission with ASO copy and designed screenshots, and Rescue & relaunch ($799, 7-14 days) for apps that were rejected or suspended. Money-back guarantee for non-rescue tiers if not live in 7 days. Android only — does not handle iOS App Store. Declines gambling without licensing, fake AI products, scrapers, copyright violations, and predatory lending without compliance. Contact via https://playship.pro/#intake or support@stockportfolio.pro.

tiers.name: Express
tiers.summary: You have a working AAB. We submit it.

tiers.name: Full launch
tiers.summary: End-to-end submission with ASO copy, designed screenshots, hosted privacy policy.

tiers.name: Rescue & relaunch
tiers.summary: Policy audit and remediation for rejected or suspended apps.
